ItacPersonItem.Notes: Gottifreddi was teacher of logic, natural philosophy, and metaphysics in the Collegio Romano, from 1627 to 1634. Without being formally associated to the Lincei Academy, Gottifreddi had strong relationship with this circle, and he delivered the funereal oration on the occasion of the death of Virginio Cesarini. See his biography by Dario Busolini in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
